name: specpowers
description: Small-core workflow routing, proportional change contracts, focused execution, review, and evidence-gated completion for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Small-core workflow routing and evidence gates for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use SpecPowers to route work into investigation, change definition, execution, review, or plugin operation, with proportional behavior contracts and one unified claim gate.
defaultPrompt: Use SpecPowers to choose the smallest honest workflow mode for this task
Define the behavior contract for this change before editing
Review this change and return one decision with evidence
